person.name: Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle

zh.lifeSummary: Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle於1271年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾。他和Mrs. Richard Whetehill至少有1個兒子。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle于1271年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾。他和Mrs. Richard Whetehill至少有1个儿子。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle was born in 1271, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 son with Mrs. Richard Whetehill. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle est né en 1271, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs. Richard Whetehill. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle wurde 1271 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mit Mrs. Richard Whetehill mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle è nato il nel 1271 nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs. Richard Whetehill. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Whethill, Shropshire, England: イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castleは1271年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた。彼はMrs. Richard Whetehillとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle(은)는 1271년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 태어났다. 그는 Mrs. Richard Whetehill(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle nasceu em 1271, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs. Richard Whetehill. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle родился в 1271 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs. Richard Whetehill. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Whethill Lieut. of Dover Castle nació en 1271, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mrs. Richard Whetehill. Murió en su pueblo.
